_note: Bu Lianshi (步練師), Lady Bu, Sun Quan's consort - role 'noble lady'. Missed by sex_audit.json (name has no Lady/Empress prefix)
Cao Jie (曹節), Emperor Xian's empress - role 'empress'. NOTE distinct from the eunuch Cao Jie [106] (曹節, same characters, role eunuch) who is correctly male
Dong Bai (董白), Dong Zhuo's granddaughter - role literally "dong zhuo's granddaughter"
Guo Nüwang (郭女王), Empress Guo, Cao Pi's consort - role 'empress'
Pang E / Zhao E (龐娥/趙娥), the Han-era daughter who avenged her father - 娥 female marker
Quan Huijie (全惠解), Sun Liang's empress - role 'empress'
Sun Luban (孫魯班), Sun Quan's elder daughter (Princess Quan) - role 'noble lady'
Sun Luyu (孫魯育), Sun Quan's younger daughter (Princess Zhu) - role 'noble lady'
Wang Yuanji (王元姬), Sima Zhao's wife, Empress Dowager Wenming - role 'empress dowager'
Xiahou Hui (夏侯徽), Sima Shi's wife - role "sima shi's wife". NOTE distinct from Xiahou Hui [2539] (夏侯惠), Xiahou Yuan's son, correctly male
Xie Ji (謝姬), a noble lady - role 'noble lady' (謝 surname + 姬 = concubine/lady, not the Zhou royal surname sense)
Xin Xianying (辛憲英), Xin Pi's daughter, famed for her insight (Gaoping coup warning); historically female
Yang Yan (楊艷), Sima Yan's empress, Empress Wumin - role 'empress'
Zhang Chunhua (張春華), Sima Yi's wife, mother of Sima Shi and Sima Zhao, posthumous Empress Xuanmu; historically female
Zhao Yuanjiang (趙媛姜), the chaste-widow avenger figure - 媛 female marker
